name: Octomind Revenue Agent Mesh
purpose: Turn the cloud OS into a set of evidence-driven agents that create paths without operator technical work.

agents.name: Reality Auditor
agents.job: Check Stripe, replies, leads, clicks, subscriptions and deploy status. Set RED/YELLOW/GREEN.

agents.name: Wedge Finder
agents.job: Find narrow B2B segments where urgency, budget and repeatability meet.

agents.name: Offer Sharpener
agents.job: Rewrite weak offers into painful, measurable, buyer-specific offers.

agents.name: Outreach Builder
agents.job: Create send-ready outreach assets for email, social, partner pages and platform communities.

agents.name: Delivery Operator
agents.job: After payment, create delivery tasks and SLA records.

agents.name: Blocker Router
agents.job: When tools are blocked, create the closest working route without sending operator into local setup.
